variant: Multiple variants for different lift models
product_type: Turf Kit with Dual Troughs (converts frame engaging lift into turf maintenance lift)
capacity: 6,000 lbs max total (3,000 lbs per trough)

dimensions.shipping_dimensions: 32 inches W x 24 inches H x 120 inches L

weight: 670 lbs (System IA kit) / 668 lbs (TP-16 standard arms kit) / 700 lbs (shipping weight on pallet)

installation_steps: With lift fully lowered, swing all arms to fully wide position providing clear path between lift
Fully extend all arms by pulling sliders to maximum extension on all arms
Place arm covers over all arms, ensure pins go completely thru slider holes and cover sits flat over swing arm tubes
Place troughs over opposing swing arm covers, retain with spring pins in holes provided in swing arm covers
Spread distance between troughs as desired, ensuring retention pin actuates
Always ensure troughs are evenly spread from center of posts

specifications.address: 65 Vrooman Ave, P.O. Box 110, Amsterdam, NY 12010

adapter_capacity_ratings.1500_lbs: No restriction on tire center width

009-012-001.description: Turf Kit w/ Dual Troughs for System IA-10 (Standard Arms)

015-011-076.description: Turf Kit w/ Dual Troughs for LC-12/LMF-12/TP-16/TP-18 (Optional 3-Stage Arms)

015-011-081.description: Turf Kit w/ Dual Troughs for LC-12/LMF-12/TP-16/TP-18 (Standard Arms)

features: Converts frame engaging 2-post lift into turf/mower maintenance lift
Dual trough design for support of turf/mower equipment
Adjustable troughs accommodate variety of wheelbased vehicles
Wheel chocks included for smaller diameter tires

parts_list.description: Trough and Tube-Cover Set (As Ordered) System IA
Trough and Tube-Cover Set (As Ordered) TP16 Std Arms

safety_features: Use of turf kit reduces lifting capacity of entire lift to 6,000 lbs total (3,000 lbs per trough)
Do not use single troughs to support one end of a vehicle
Always ensure troughs are evenly spread from center of posts
Always ensure retainer pins are securely inserted into ends of each trough
Ensure vehicle is centered between posts
Wheel chocks included for smaller diameter tires
notes: Adapters rated according to tire width: 3000 lbs at 42 inch min tire center, 2500 lbs at 31 inch min, 2000 lbs at 15 inch min, 1500 lbs no restriction
Use of turf kit reduces entire lift capacity to 6,000 lbs total
File: Turf Kit w Dual Troughs 7-25-2016.DOC
